new_classes.label_en: Plum, pear or cherry spirit (excl. liqueurs), in containers holding > 2 l (CN 2208 90 38)
new_classes.label_de: Pflaumen-, Birnen- oder Kirschwasser (kein Likör), in Behältnissen mit mehr als 2 l (KN 2208 90 38)
new_classes.definition_en: Spirituous beverages obtained exclusively by fermenting and distilling plum, pear or cherry musts (excluding liqueurs), presented in containers holding more than 2 litres.

coverage_explanation: All key discriminating criteria from the legal text are captured: (1) the spirit must be plum, pear or cherry spirit — encoded via PlumPearCherryFruitSpiritQuality and PlumPearCherryFruitMashDistillationProcess (fermentation + distillation of fruit musts exclusively); (2) liqueurs are explicitly excluded — encoded via complement of LiqueurSpiritousQuality; (3) container size > 2 l — encoded via LargeContainer (≥ 2 L from TBox, which in the context of this pair with 22089033 ≤ 2 L covers the > 2 L branch). Minor gap: the TBox LargeContainer uses ≥ 2 L (minInclusive 2.0) rather than strictly > 2 L; the boundary case of exactly 2 L is ambiguous between 22089033 and 22089038, but this reflects the CN code threshold convention. The exclusive origin from plum/pear/cherry musts (as clarified by the HS Explanatory Note reference to heading 0809) is covered implicitly through the production process class but not formally by an origin quality — no dedicated FruitMushOriginQuality for this specific HS reference exists in the TBox and none was created since the production process class already encodes this constraint.
